# GenInsights — UML & Architecture Diagrams

**Repository:** test-custom-agents-2  
**Generated by:** GenInsights All-in-One Agent

---

## 1. System Architecture Overview

```mermaid
flowchart TB
    subgraph Browser["🌐 Browser (node-vue-client)"]
        VueApp["Vue 2 App\n(App.vue)"]
        SearchComp["Search Component\n(Search.vue)"]
        WS_Client["Native WebSocket\nws://localhost:1337/"]
        VueApp --> SearchComp
        SearchComp --> WS_Client
    end

    subgraph NodeServer["⚙️ Node.js Server (node-server)"]
        HTTP_Server["http.createServer()"]
        WS_Server["WebSocket Server\n(websocket lib 1.0.35)"]
        ClientList["clients[ ] array\n(in-memory broadcast list)"]
        HTTP_Server --> WS_Server
        WS_Server --> ClientList
    end

    subgraph JavaSwing["🖥️ Java Swing Desktop (swing/)"]
        SwingUI_WS["websocket.Main\n(WebSocket client + UI)"]
        SwingUI_POC["com.poc PocView\n(Presenter-Model UI)"]
        WS_Endpoint["WebsocketClientEndpoint\n(javax.websocket)"]
        PocPresenter["PocPresenter"]
        PocModel["PocModel"]
        HttpService["HttpBinService\n(java.net.HttpURLConnection)"]
        SwingUI_WS --> WS_Endpoint
        SwingUI_POC --> PocPresenter
        PocPresenter --> PocModel
        PocModel --> HttpService
    end

    subgraph External["☁️ External Services"]
        HTTPBin["HTTPBin Docker\nhttp://localhost:8080/post"]
    end

    WS_Client <-->|"WebSocket\nws://localhost:1337/"| WS_Server
    WS_Endpoint <-->|"WebSocket\nws://localhost:1337/"| WS_Server
    HttpService -->|"HTTP POST\nhttp://localhost:8080/post"| HTTPBin
```

---

## 2. Class Diagram — Java Swing (websocket package)

```mermaid
classDiagram
    class Main {
        -CountDownLatch latch$
        -JFrame frame$
        -JTextArea textArea$
        -JTextField tf_name$
        -JTextField tf_first$
        -JTextField tf_dob$
        -JTextField tf_zip$
        -JTextField tf_ort$
        -JTextField tf_street$
        -JTextField tf_hausnr$
        -JTextField tf_ze_iban$
        -JTextField tf_ze_bic$
        -JTextField tf_ze_valid_from$
        -JRadioButton rb_female$
        -JRadioButton rb_male$
        -JRadioButton rb_diverse$
        -JsonParserFactory jsonParserFactory$
        +main(String[] args)$
        -initUI()$
        +extract(String json)$ Message
        +toSearchResult(String json)$ SearchResult
    }

    class WebsocketClientEndpoint {
        +Session userSession
        +WebsocketClientEndpoint(URI endpointURI)
        +onOpen(Session)
        +onClose(Session, CloseReason)
        +onMessage(String json)
        +sendMessage(String message)
    }

    class Message {
        +String target
        +String content
        +Message(String target, String message)
    }

    class SearchResult {
        +String name
        +String first
        +String dob
        +String zip
        +String ort
        +String street
        +String hausnr
        +String ze_iban
        +String ze_bic
        +String ze_valid_from
    }

    Main +-- WebsocketClientEndpoint : inner class
    Main +-- Message : inner class
    Main +-- SearchResult : inner class
    WebsocketClientEndpoint ..> Message : creates
    WebsocketClientEndpoint ..> SearchResult : calls toSearchResult()
```

---

## 3. Class Diagram — Java Swing (com.poc package)

```mermaid
classDiagram
    class PocView {
        +JFrame frame
        +JTextArea textArea
        +JTextField name
        +JTextField firstName
        +JTextField dateOfBirth
        +JTextField zip
        +JTextField ort
        +JTextField street
        +JTextField iban
        +JTextField bic
        +JTextField validFrom
        +JRadioButton female
        +JRadioButton male
        +JRadioButton diverse
        +ButtonGroup gender
        +JButton button
        +PocView()
        -initUI()
    }

    class PocPresenter {
        -PocView view
        -PocModel model
        +PocPresenter(PocView, PocModel, EventEmitter)
        -bind(JTextComponent, ModelProperties)
        -bind(JRadioButton, ModelProperties)
        -initializeBindings()
    }

    class PocModel {
        +Map~ModelProperties, ValueModel~ model
        -HttpBinService httpBinService
        -EventEmitter eventEmitter
        +PocModel(EventEmitter)
        +action() throws IOException, InterruptedException
    }

    class ValueModel~T~ {
        -T field
        +ValueModel(T field)
        +getField() T
        +setField(T field)
    }

    class HttpBinService {
        +String URL$
        +String PATH$
        +String CONTENT_TYPE$
        +post(Map~String,String~ data) String
    }

    class EventEmitter {
        -List~EventListener~ listeners
        +subscribe(EventListener)
        +emit(String eventData)
    }

    class EventListener {
        <<interface>>
        +onEvent(String eventData)
    }

    class ModelProperties {
        <<enumeration>>
        TEXT_AREA
        FIRST_NAME
        LAST_NAME
        DATE_OF_BIRTH
        ZIP
        ORT
        STREET
        IBAN
        BIC
        VALID_FROM
        FEMALE
        MALE
        DIVERSE
    }

    class ViewData {
        <<empty - dead code>>
    }

    PocPresenter --> PocView : controls
    PocPresenter --> PocModel : uses
    PocPresenter --> EventEmitter : subscribes
    PocModel --> HttpBinService : delegates HTTP
    PocModel --> EventEmitter : emits events
    PocModel --> ValueModel : stores field values
    PocModel --> ModelProperties : keys
    EventEmitter --> EventListener : notifies
    PocPresenter ..|> EventListener : lambda
```

---

## 4. Sequence Diagram — Person Search & WebSocket Broadcast Flow

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant U as User (Browser)
    participant S as Search.vue
    participant WS_N as Node WS Server
    participant WS_J as Java WS Client

    U->>S: types in search field & clicks Suchen
    S->>S: searchPerson() — filters search_space[]
    S-->>U: renders matching rows in table

    U->>S: clicks row (selectResult)
    S->>S: selected_result = item

    U->>S: clicks "Nach ALLEGRO übernehmen"
    S->>S: sendMessage(selected_result, 'textfield')
    S->>WS_N: send JSON { target: "textfield", content: {...} }

    WS_N->>WS_N: broadcast to all clients[]
    WS_N->>WS_J: forward JSON message

    WS_J->>WS_J: onMessage(json)
    WS_J->>WS_J: extract(json) → Message
    WS_J->>WS_J: toSearchResult(message.content)
    WS_J-->>WS_J: populate tf_name, tf_first, tf_dob...
```

---

## 5. Sequence Diagram — PoC Presenter Action Flow

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant U as User
    participant V as PocView
    participant P as PocPresenter
    participant M as PocModel
    participant H as HttpBinService
    participant E as EventEmitter
    participant EXT as HTTPBin :8080

    U->>V: types in text field
    V->>P: DocumentListener.insertUpdate()
    P->>M: model.setField(content)

    U->>V: clicks "Anordnen"
    V->>P: ActionListener fires
    P->>M: action()
    M->>H: post(data)
    H->>EXT: HTTP POST /post (JSON)
    EXT-->>H: 200 OK + response body
    H-->>M: responseBody
    M->>E: emit(responseBody)
    E->>P: onEvent(responseBody)
    P->>V: textArea.setText(responseBody)
    P->>V: clear all fields
```

---

## 6. Component Diagram — Layer View

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    subgraph Presentation["Presentation Layer"]
        A[App.vue]
        B[Search.vue]
        C[PocView.java]
        A --> B
    end

    subgraph Business["Business / Application Layer"]
        D[PocPresenter.java]
        E[PocModel.java]
        F[EventEmitter.java]
        D --> E
        D --> F
        E --> F
    end

    subgraph Infrastructure["Infrastructure Layer"]
        G[HttpBinService.java]
        H[WebsocketServer.js]
        I[WebsocketClientEndpoint.java]
        J[Native WebSocket API]
    end

    subgraph External["External Services"]
        K[(HTTPBin\n:8080)]
        L[(WebSocket Bus\n:1337)]
    end

    C --> D
    B --> J
    J <-->|ws| L
    I <-->|ws| L
    H <-->|ws| L
    G -->|http| K
```

---

## 7. Use Case Diagram

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    User(["👤 User\n(Browser)"])
    Agent(["🖥️ Agent\n(Java Swing)"])

    subgraph VueApp["Vue Frontend (node-vue-client)"]
        UC1["Search person\nby name/address"]
        UC2["Select search result"]
        UC3["Select payment recipient\n(Zahlungsempfänger)"]
        UC4["Transfer to ALLEGRO\n(Nach ALLEGRO übernehmen)"]
        UC5["Edit free-text area"]
    end

    subgraph SwingApp["Java Swing (swing/)"]
        UC6["View transferred\nperson data"]
        UC7["View text area\ncontent"]
        UC8["Submit form\n(Anordnen)"]
    end

    subgraph Server["Node Server (node-server)"]
        UC9["Relay WS messages\nto all connected clients"]
    end

    User --> UC1
    User --> UC2
    User --> UC3
    User --> UC4
    User --> UC5
    Agent --> UC6
    Agent --> UC7
    Agent --> UC8
    UC4 -->|"triggers"| UC9
    UC5 -->|"triggers"| UC9
    UC9 -->|"broadcasts to"| UC6
    UC9 -->|"broadcasts to"| UC7
```

---

## 8. Modernisation Target Architecture (Recommended)

```mermaid
flowchart TB
    subgraph Browser["🌐 Browser (Modernised)"]
        Vue3["Vue 3 + Vite\n<script setup> Composition API"]
        WSComposable["useWebSocket() composable\n(reconnect + error handling)"]
        EnvConfig["import.meta.env.VITE_WS_URL"]
        Vue3 --> WSComposable
        WSComposable --> EnvConfig
    end

    subgraph NodeServer["⚙️ Node.js Server (Modernised)"]
        WS_Lib["ws ^8.x\n(standard WS library)"]
        OriginCheck["Origin validation\nallowlist"]
        ESM["ESM modules\n(import/export)"]
        WS_Lib --> OriginCheck
    end

    subgraph Java["☕ Java (Modernised)"]
        JakartaWS["jakarta.websocket.*\nTyrus 2.2.0"]
        JakartaJSON["jakarta.json.*\nParsson 1.1.7"]
        HttpClient["java.net.http.HttpClient\n(Java 11+)"]
        SLF4J["SLF4J + Logback\n(structured logging)"]
        JUnit5["JUnit 5 + Mockito\n(unit tests)"]
    end

    subgraph CI["🔄 CI/CD"]
        GHA["GitHub Actions\nbuild + lint + test"]
    end

    WSComposable <-->|"wss:// TLS"| WS_Lib
    JakartaWS <-->|"wss:// TLS"| WS_Lib
    HttpClient -->|"https://"| ExtService["External Service"]
    GHA -.->|"validates"| Browser
    GHA -.->|"validates"| NodeServer
    GHA -.->|"validates"| Java
```
